  (block

    (fn check_limit
      (block
        (let now
          (call
            (. now_ms)
          )
        )
        (let idx
          (-
            1
          )
        )

            0
            (dispatch len
              (. ips)

              (==

                  (. ips)
                  i
                )

          (==
            idx
            (-
              1
            )
          )
          (block

              (assign
                (. ips)
                (dispatch push
                  (. ips)
                  ip

                (. tokens)

                  (. tokens)

                  (. last_updated)
                  now

              true

            now
            (index
              (. last_updated)
              idx

            (*
              elapsed
              (. max_tokens)

            current_tokens
            1

              (assign
                (index
                  (. tokens)
                  idx

                  current_tokens
                  1

                (index
                  (. last_updated)
                  idx
                )

            (return
              true

          )
          (block
            (return
              false

          )

  (fn _convert_path
    (block

      )
      (let remaining

      (while
        (>
          (dispatch len
            remaining
